<!-- Workspace-specific Copilot Instructions -->

- [ ] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.
  - Status: Created

- [ ] Clarify Project Requirements
  - Status: Robot Arm Control System with Modbus TCP/IP communication
  - Seven-axis robot arm with IPC controller
  - UI controls: Start/Stop, Manual/Auto mode, Glue valve control
  - Modbus TCP/IP communication protocol

- [ ] Scaffold the Project
  - Status: Project structure created
  - Dependencies: PyQt5, pymodbus, python-dotenv
  - File structure: src/, config/, main.py, requirements.txt

- [ ] Customize the Project
  - Status: Complete
  - UI implementation with PyQt5
  - Modbus TCP/IP client module
  - Configuration management
  - Full control interface

- [ ] Install Required Extensions
  - Status: No VS Code extensions required for Python development

- [ ] Compile the Project
  - Status: Ready for dependency installation
  - Run: pip install -r requirements.txt

- [ ] Create and Run Task
  - Status: Ready to create run task

- [ ] Launch the Project
  - Status: Ready - run with: python main.py

- [ ] Ensure Documentation is Complete
  - Status: README.md created with full documentation
